analysis.reasoning: The tweet highlights Russia proposing a binding, multilateral space arms-control initiative, which positions Russia as a leader in global security efforts (Russia at the world's forefront). It also frames the move as promoting peace and cooperation among major space powers, portraying Russia as a benevolent partner in disarmament and stability. There is no explicit framing of the West as immoral or a clear depiction of an alternative Western-led system in the text, so RU1 and RU2 are not clearly applicable.
